title: Overview
description: The consolidated Phoenix Core intel archive of the Aurelia System, personel, enemies and operations.

title: Phoenix Core
description: Restricted archive concerning the Phoenix initiative, command intelligence, and core strategic records.

title: Aurelia System
description: Binary star system containing Neo Terra, Selara, Ironreach, and the major theaters of conflict.

title: Neo Terra
description: Industrial population center and one of the most strategically important worlds in the Aurelia System.

title: Selara
description: A distant world of strategic importance, known for its harsh beauty and operational significance.

title: Ironreach
description: A hardened outpost zone tied to frontier defense, military logistics, and contested routes.

title: Fighters
description: Archive of active fighter platforms, combat variants, and deployment-ready craft.
